claim: Aider is open-source, free AI coding tool with multi-file editing; outperforms Cursor on many tasks while giving you full control and no lock-in
actionable: Diversify your AI coding toolkit: use both Cursor and Aider depending on task; don't lock into closed-source tools early in AI era
source_title: Cursor is great BUT Aider is the OG AI Coding King (Mermaid Diagram AI Agent)

claim: Aider's /ask command builds conversation before implementation: ask about function locations, draft changes, review reasoning, then implement—reduces mistakes
actionable: Use Aider /ask to draft before committing; say 'go ahead and make that change' only after reviewing the proposed edits
source_title: Cursor is great BUT Aider is the OG AI Coding King (Mermaid Diagram AI Agent)

claim: Aider shows token usage and costs per command; token metrics visible for every LLM interaction; enables cost tracking across different models
actionable: Run /tokens command in Aider to see context window usage and estimated costs; optimize for cheap models (Haiku) when token count permits
source_title: Cursor is great BUT Aider is the OG AI Coding King (Mermaid Diagram AI Agent)

claim: Aider can one-shot multi-file changes across codebases; add relevant files with /add, request feature, get implementation in single go
actionable: For focused features, add only relevant files to context; request implementation; Aider will handle multi-file edits atomically
source_title: Cursor is great BUT Aider is the OG AI Coding King (Mermaid Diagram AI Agent)

claim: Aider integrates with Paul Gauthier's LLM leaderboard; benchmarks code changes on real-world repos, enabling objective model comparison for coding
actionable: Check aider.chat/llms for live model performance rankings on code-editing tasks; use top-ranked models for production work
source_title: Cursor is great BUT Aider is the OG AI Coding King (Mermaid Diagram AI Agent)

claim: Mermaid diagram generation as AI agent use case: fast iteration with human-in-the-loop; generate 5 versions of same diagram, pick best, refine
actionable: Use Mermaid + LLMs to generate multiple diagram variations; have humans select best version, then refine iteratively
source_title: Cursor is great BUT Aider is the OG AI Coding King (Mermaid Diagram AI Agent)

claim: Framework choices matter less with good AI coding; Claude can convert code across frameworks (Vue → React, etc.) instantly; focus on architecture not syntax
actionable: Don't optimize for framework knowledge; let Claude handle framework conversion; focus energy on data models and system design
source_title: Cursor is great BUT Aider is the OG AI Coding King (Mermaid Diagram AI Agent)
